mapper.select: select ui.user_id, ui.user_nm, ui.user_pwd, ui.telno, ui.hp_no, ui.email, ui.confirm_yn, ui.comp_id, ui.dept_id, ui.workplace_id, ui.role_id, ui.user_stat, ui.indict_yn, ri.role_nm, ri.role_security, ri.role_level, ri.upper_role_id, ri.role_desc, ri.status_flag, ui.reg_dt, ui.upd_dt, ui.user_emp_nmb from user_info ui left outer join role_info ri on ri.role_id = ui.role_id where ui.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_info SET user_nm = #{userNm}, email = #{email}, telno = #{telno}, hp_no = #{hpNo} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
